evidence: evidence: PR body: two resolve-lock requests may share one response; avoid modifying shared response (race).
evidence: diff adds decodeRegionMetaKeyWithShallowCopy and uses it on RegionEpochNotMatch to shallow-copy Region before decoding keys (store/tikv/pd_codec.go, store/tikv/region_cache.go).
evidence: PR body: like function is not thread-safe and results in unstable errors.
evidence: diff introduces sync.Once and avoids using shared pattern fields to prevent data races (expression/builtin_like.go, expression/builtin_like_vec.go).
evidence: PR title: make test TestShowTableRegion stable.
evidence: sets global tidb_scatter_region=1 before enabling split regions to make ShowTableRegion deterministic (executor/executor_test.go).
evidence: PR title: fix data race when simpleRewriter rewrites ast.ColumnNameExpr concurrently.

evidence: diff avoids rewriting from shared AST column; uses schema column by index/name and removes ast.ExprNode field from pruning struct (planner/core/rule_partition_processor.go, table/tables/partition.go).
evidence: PR title: fix failpoint race for analyze test.
evidence: diff moves TestFailedAnalyzeRequest to a different suite (testSuite9) to avoid failpoint/test interference (executor/analyze_test.go).
evidence: PR title: fix the forever hang in index merge join when OOM occurs.
evidence: diff closes task.results and cancels worker on OOM path; adds a test that asserts it doesn't hang (executor/index_lookup_merge_join.go, executor/index_lookup_merge_join_test.go).
